SysMess.Text: Hmm, what to make...
Which cauldron should I use?
What materials to use...
How should I make this...
Okay, let's start.
...I can relax on this one.
I'll use this here.
How about this?
This material... Goes right here.
This isn't bad.
Huh, so that's what happens...
Yeah, good.
The quality might get better.
The effect might increase.
It could gain a trait.
This might finish quicker...
Oh this... This is good...
Yeah, this looks good.
This is no good...
Hmm, I might have messed up...
I'll put the material in.
I'll stir the cauldron.
Mix it around and around.
Feeling good about this!
This... Should work great!
Is this good?
Yeah, I should finish it quick.
It's don-... W-wah! There's something wrong with this...!
It's done!
I made this really well.
Yeah, this is good.
I made something unusual... I thought it would turn out no good...
What traits should I transfer?
Is this really okay?
Oh no, I failed...
Alright, it's done!
Okay, what should I make?
Which cauldron is best?
What materials should I use?
Hmm, how should I make this...
Okay then, let's start!
Maybe I'll relax a little on this.
This material goes here.
This... Should go here.
This goes here!
Yeah, this is good!
This is great!
I think something good will happen.
The quality could get better.
I think the effect will increase.
I feel like this will gain a trait.
This looks like it'll finish sooner.
Alright, this is going well!
Yeah, this is going great!
Hm, this isn't going very well...
Oh, this looks kind of bad...
Materials go in!
Mix, mix, mix.
I'll mix it up!
This is looking amazing!
Alright, I'm really into this!
Is this really okay?
Alright, I'll finish it now!
Okay... Wait? What? This doesn't seem right...
Ehehe, it went better than usual!
Yeah! It turned out really good!
It's different from what I thought... But whatever!
What traits to transfer?
Is this okay?
Waah, I failed!?
Okay, it's finished!
What kind of stuff should I make?
Now which cauldron...
Which materials should I choose?
How to make this...
Okay, I'll try it!
I'll relax just a little.
I've decided this material goes here.
I think... This would be best here.
I'll try this here.
Oh, this reaction is interesting.
Whoa, this looks kind of amazing.
I feel like something great will happen!
The quality should get better.
Will the effect increase?
Maybe a trait will appear.
This should finish a little faster!
Alright, this looks great!
It's going great!
Huh? This is weird...
This is kind of...
Putting in the materials!
Mix, mix, round and round.
Now go!
Going perfect!
I'm really excited now!
Will this go well?
Okay, it's time to finish!
Alright...! Huh? This is weird... But it should be fine!
Done and done!
This is really good!
I made it super well!
It's not what I imagined, but... This is good, in its own way!
What traits should I add?
How's this?
Waah, what's this!? I failed...
Yeah, this is all done!
What will you make?
What cauldron will you use?
Selecting materials is very important.
How will you make this?
Very well, begin.
Doing this by eye? ...Well, that's fine.
Not a bad choice.
I see.
So you decided to put it there.
That's a unique reaction.
I see an excellent result.
An appropriate choice.
The quality should increase.
The effect should increase.
A trait should appear.
The time should be reduced.
Keep it up.
This isn't good...
A bad trend.
Adding materials?
Be sure to stir it well.
Just go slow and steady.
A good indication.
The results should be wonderful.
Is this what you wanted?
It's time to finish it. Don't relax yet.
Finishing it? Hm? Could this reaction be...
It's complete.
A wonderful degree of perfection.
This result is... You've done well, Sophie.
This is... You've created something unusual.
What traits will you transfer?
Is that okay?
This is... A failure...
It's complete. Good work.
Which item will you make?
Choose the cauldron you'll use.
Are you selecting materials?
Do you know how to make this?
Show me your skills.
This shouldn't be much work to make.
You're using that material there?
You're putting it in there?
An excellent reaction.
You have good sense.
As expected of you.
I believe the quality will increase.
I believe the effect will increase.
I believe a trait will appear.
The Synthesis time should decrease.
Just continue like that.
I see you understand the theories well.
Calm down a little.
You're adding materials?
Sophie, you should handle the materials more carefully...
Mixy mix... Ahem. No, I didn't say anything.
This is... Quite splendid.
Continue at this rate.
Do you see any issues with this?
Time to finish... I always get nervous.
Time to finish... But this reaction... Very interesting.
Looks done.
A result worthy of praise.
This is splendid.
This is different from expectations, but... It's not bad.
Which traits will you add?
Are you sure about this?
Unfortunately, you seem to have failed...
It's complete. You worked hard.
What are you going to Synthesize?
Which cauldron are you going to use?
What materials will you be using?
How can you make this?
I look forward to seeing how you make it.
That should be fine.
Good progress.
Now, what could happen...
You're putting it there?
I think we can expect a lot out of this.
I think that's good.
Very respectable.
The quality appears to be increasing.
The effect appears to be increasing.
A new trait should appear.
The Synthesis time appears to have decreased.
That's quite something.
This should create a good result.
Changing the flow of Synthesis...?
Think about compatibility with the cauldron.
Do your best to mix it.
That's not how you should mix it. Do it more like this...
Let's add the materials.
Hehe. You seem to be into this.
Quite magnificent. Excellent work, Sophie.
Are you okay with this?
Now, time to finish. Just don't get careless.
Are you completing... Hm? This could be interesting.
You've finished.
This result... You've improved again.
This is... You can be quite confident about this.
Hehe, you made something interesting.
Select the traits to transfer.
Is this okay with you?
You've failed... It's okay, there's always next time.
This was fun for me too.
Returning to material selection will reset material input and skill use. Is this okay?
Where should I go?
Where are we going?
Where are we going next?
Alright, where to?
What's our destination?
Where to?
Where can we go next?
Got a destination?
Where do you intend to go next?
Hehehe, where are we going?
Where should we go?
Hey, where are we going next?
This is the same place... Is it okay?
We were just here... Are we going to explore it again?
Is this okay? We just went here...
Hey, Sophie. We just checked this place... Is this really okay?
We just investigated this area... Do you mind going again?
We were just here. Are we searching it again?
I think we just went here. Or do you already know that?
Hey, wait. We just checked this place. Are we going again?
Wait, we were just in here. Do you want to explore it more?
Oh my, we just went here. Are we going to look again?
Are we going to the same place again?
Sophie, you know we just went here, right? Or do you want to check again?
I have other things to do now.
Sophie, you have something to do first.
Wait, is this really the time for that?
Hey wait, don't you have something else to do?
Perhaps you should complete your other goal first?
I think you have something else to do first.
Is it really okay to do this now?
Don't you have something better to do?
Wait, are you taking the scenic route or something?
Oh dear, don't you have something to do first?
Is it really the time to be doing this?
Wait up. This isn't the time for that, is it?
Huh? What is that?
Sophie, there's something over there.
What could that be?
Hey, what's that? There's something there.
Look over there. There appears to be something.
Hm? What exactly is that...?
We found... Something.
What is that...
Oh my, what could that be?
Ah, we found something.
What could that be...
Hey, I found something!
Waah, what is this?
This is...!
Eek, what!?
Whoa, what's going on!?
What's that!?
What is it...?
What's this...?
What could that be?
Oh dear, what is this?
Wait, what!? I didn't hear about this!
We can go to a new place now!
A new place, huh... Ehehe, this is exciting.
A new place... I hope we can gather amazing materials there.
A new place... What could be there?
Looks like we can go to a new place.
It seems that we can now go to a new place.
Ehehe, that was good!
I didn't expect such luck.
Hehe, so things like this happen too.
This is thanks to my good karma!
Haha, we're in luck.
Hahaha, a splendid event.
That was good... I'm happy.
This isn't bad.
Hehe, I feel good now.
Thank you, God.
Heh, that's good.
Yeah, we're super lucky!
Uu, that was bad...
What a disaster...
I didn't think this would happen...
Uu, what did I do to deserve this...
Hahaha... That was unexpectedly bad...
Grr. That was just bad luck...
I want... To go home...
Damn it. Why did this have to happen...
*Sigh*... That doesn't put me in a good mood...
Uu, did I do something bad...?
Uu, that was no good...
No! I'm done! I want to go home!
Ow... They got us...
I was careless. I'll be more careful next time.
I'm sorry, if only I did better...
Damn, my body hurts... We got beat up pretty bad...
I let my guard down... This won't happen again.
I'm sorry, it's because I'm too weak. I need to train more...
Ow... It really is dangerous outside of town.
...I won't make the same mistake twice.
The enemies are pretty strong. That's fine, we'll pay them back next time!
Oh dear... Don't overdo it, okay?
We got beat pretty bad... Let's think about why we lost.
Ouch... I don't even have the strength left to complain...
I see you're working early. What do you want to buy?
Are you getting hungry yet? My vegetables are always fresh and delicious!
Another day's almost over... Buy something before I close shop!
I restocked the goods I was short on. Buy whatever you want!
I tried acquiring new goods. Want to take a look?
Ah, I have some rare goods in stock. You should look at them!
I've got a big sale now! Buy whatever you want!
What do you want to buy?
Hmm, you don't have enough money...
You can't hold any more. Sorry, but can you make space for it?
What do you want to sell?
You don't have anything I can buy from you.
Is this okay?
Thank as always!
Come again anytime.
*Yawn*... I'm sleepy... But I'll work hard. By the way... What do you need today?
Nn... I'm sleepy after eating... But I need to work...
*Yawn*. I'm tired again today... Are you here to buy something?
I refilled the items that were low on stock. It's all ready for you.
I have new items in stock. If you're interested...
I did my best to stock rare items. Can you buy them?
I did my best to reduce my prices... Can you buy more items?
What are you going to buy?
You don't... Have enough money. I can't sell it to you like this...
You have too many items. Come back after making adjustments...
What are you going to sell?
...Hm? You don't seem to have anything to sell...
Are you really okay with this?
Thank you.
Please come again.
It's pretty early. How are you doing? Anyway, time for business.
Welcome, thanks for coming. What do you need today?
Whew, I'm kind of tired by this time of day... But I'll work.
I've restocked on goods I ran out of. Feel free to buy more.
I've got some new wares. You should take a look since you're here.
I've stocked something kind of rare... Want to see?
I'm selling my wares for cheap right now. You might want to take advantage of that.
What are you buying?
I'm sorry, but you don't have the money.
You've got too many belongings. You should adjust that and come back.
What are you selling?
Wait, you don't have anything to sell me.
This is okay, right?
That's a deal.
I'll see you again.
Good morning, you look lively today. Now then... What are you looking for?
Welcome to my shop. I have lots of merchandise that's perfect for you.
Hehe, I thought you'd show up around now. You want to buy something?
I've restocked my wares. Buy as much as you want.
I have some new merchandise now. You'll take a look, right?
I have some rare merchandise right now. Will you take a look?
I've got a special discount right now. Now's your chance to buy lots of stuff!
Which one do you want?
Oh, that's too bad. You don't have enough money...
Your hands are totally full. Sorry, but you've got to make space first.
Which one do you want to sell?
Oh dear, you don't have anything to sell.
You're sure, right?
Hehe, thanks.
Come back again. I'll be waiting.
Good morning, Sophie. What do you need today?
Welcome, thank you for coming. Feel free to take your time.
...Oh, sorry. I was really into this book... You want to buy something?
I restocked the items I was low on. You can buy them again.
I have new merchandise. Are you interested?
I have rare items that I normally can't stock. You should take a look.
I'm selling items for cheaper than usual now. Buy a lot, okay?
What will you buy?
...I'm sorry. You don't have enough money.
You can't hold more. I'm sorry, can you make room?
What will you sell?
Hm? You don't have anything to sell...
Is this okay?
Thank you.
Hehe, feel free to come back anytime.
Morning! And welcome! What do you need?
Welcome to Tess's shop! What do you need?
Ah, Sophie, thanks for coming. Take your time, okay?
I've restocked stuff that was gone. You can trade for them again.
I've got new stuff in stock. Feel free to trade for them!
I've got some rare stuff! You can trade for those too.
I'm having a little sale now. You might find a better deal than usual.
What will you trade for?
Sorry, you don't have enough vouchers for that.
Oh, you seem to be holding too much stuff. Come back after fixing that.
Sorry, I don't have anything to trade right now...
Is that okay?
Just take it, it's a steal for you!
Thanks for your business!
Come back whenever you want!
Sophie, did you eat breakfast? Oh, you want to buy something?
Welcome. Buy lots of things to help the church, okay?
Hehe, I've found a lost lamb. Is there something you want?
I have more of the items I ran out of. Buy lots of stuff, okay?
I found new goods, so I'm stocking them. Feel free to buy them.
I found something unusual, so I have it in stock now.
I'm selling goods for really cheap right now. Buy it all, okay?
What will you buy from me?
Oh dear. You don't have enough money.
It looks like you can't hold more. You should get rid of stuff you don't want.
What will you sell to me?
You don't have anything to sell...
Is this really okay?
Thank you very much.
Come again, okay?
Are you registering an item for duplication? Which one?
I see... So you'll register this?
This... Seems really amazing. You want to register this?
I'm sorry. I don't see anything that I can duplicate...
I can't register any more items... Will you replace another?
Okay, I'll do my best to duplicate it...
Refilling your items? Um, it will cost this much...
Refilling your items? With your discount... It's this much.
Refilling your items? Excluding yours... It will cost this much.
Refilling... Huh? You don't have anything to refill.
I did my best to refill them.
You don't have enough money... Um... I'm running a business, so...
I'm refilling items when you get home. Do you want to stop?
I'm not refilling items when you get home. Do you want to?
I understand. I'll stop refilling your items...
I understand. I'll start refilling your items...
Insufficient money.
Your basket is full. Throw something away to make space.
Your container is full. Throw items away or sell them to make space.
You have nothing to sell. Important items and items with a sell price of 0 cannot be sold.
What weapon do you want to make?
Tell me which materials to use.
Is this material okay?
Choose the traits you want to add.
Is this alright?
Okay, I'll start making it.
Alright, it's done. I think it turned out well.
It's done... Wait, what's this? This is different from what I thought... Well, it's not bad.
What weapon do you want to enhance?
What material will you use for enhancement?
Is this okay?
Alright, time to start enhancing...
It's done. Here you go, take it.
Hehe. What armor do you want to make?
Which materials should I use?
Is this material okay with you?
Are there any traits you want it to have?
Is this okay?
I got it. I'll make the best armor for you.
It's done. Hmm... It looks great.
It's done... Maybe I overdid it a little... But it's great, isn't it?
What armor should I enhance?
What materials should I use?
Is this okay with you?
Hehe, time to show off my skills.
It's done. What do you think? I'm the best, right?
Welcome. Thank you for coming, Sophie.
I'll see you again.
Welcome. Thank you for coming, Sophie.
I'll see you again.
Which request will you accept?
I don't have any requests right now... Can you come back again?
Is this request okay?
Thank you. I'm counting on you.
You intend to refuse a request? ...Are you sure?
I see... I can understand why, but it's not exactly praiseworthy...
I see... I can understand why, but it's not exactly praiseworthy...
I don't get it at all... This looks impossible...
I know how to make it, but I don't have materials...
Yeah, I have the materials, and I can make it in time.
Hmm, even if I started now, I wouldn't make the deadline...
I have enough materials, I can make this right away.
I can make it, but I don't have the materials...
I haven't made this before, but I have enough. But should I really hand it over...
Yeah, I can turn this request in anytime.
I've never heard of this... It might be difficult...
I don't have enough on me. I'd need to gather it outside...
Yeah, I have enough on me, so I can report this anytime.
Huh? I've never heard of this monster...
I've fought this monster before, but... I wonder if I can win...
Yeah, I've beat this monster before... I should be fine.
I can report this anytime.
This request looks tough... I should make sure to check the contents.
Oh no, this request is past its deadline! I need to hurry and report it...
Hmm... I don't think I'd make it in time...
Thank you very much. Here is your payment.
Ah, this is... Excellent work. I've increased your reward.
You've gone this far... I'll pay you very well for this.
It may be partial, but it still helps. Here is your reward.
You completed an entire series of requests. You've been very helpful.
This is from me. Your help is greatly appreciated, thank you.
...Oh my, it seems you have too many items. Please make adjustments.
What rumor do you wish to hear?
I haven't heard any particularly interesting rumors. Please come back again.
Is that rumor okay?
Thank you very much. I'll tell you now.
Oh, I have a new idea.
Alright, I thought of something!
I have a good idea.
I think I can make something new.
Hehe, I can make more stuff now.
I thought up a new recipe!
Maybe I'm a little better now?
I have more confidence now.
Ah... I think I understand more now.
I think I can do something amazing now!
Hm... I feel like I can make something amazing.
Level up!
Sophie, did you think of something?
That face... It looks like you have an idea.
You created a new recipe? Congratulations.
You made a recipe on your own... I'm amazed at your creativity.
It seems you can create more now.
A new recipe... You've done well, Sophie.
That's one step closer to the truth of alchemy.
Your speed of growth surprises even me.
It seems you've improved your skills again, Sophie.
There's no downside to learning such a skill.
You've mastered another secret of alchemy.
You've improved your alchemy. Congratulations.
What should I do...
Is this okay?
Hmm, a hard decision...
I'll think about it a little.
Is this what you wanted?
What to do...
Okay, I've decided!
Yeah, I'll do this!
I've decided.
Let's do this.
I'll stop this...
This doesn't seem good...
We should stop.
That won't work.
It's a barrel!
Barrel barrel.
It appears to be a barrel.
Oh, I can't carry any more... Hm, what should I throw away?
Sophie. You can't hold any more. You might want to throw something away.
I'll use this!
How about this?
Using this!
Use this.
Using an item?
This is the power of alchemy.
Okay, request complete!
That request is done.
Yeah, that request is over!
You've completed a request. Good work.
That should complete a request.
It seems a request is complete. Good work.
What's this? A new discovery!?
What could this be? I don't know...
I found something interesting. I should record it.
Sophie. This could be a new discovery.
We've found an unusual item...
This is valuable... Sophie, you should record it.
Is this... An alchemy item? Why was it here...
Ah, this is... I can use this. Yay!
Found an alchemy item.
It seems you've found an alchemy item. It should still be usable.
Sophie, there's an alchemy item. We should take it.
It's an alchemy item. Alchemists should reuse things wherever possible.
Treasure chest!
What could be inside?
Please be something amazing!
A treasure chest? What could be inside?
I'm curious what could be inside.
We should open it.
There's something there. What should I do...
What could this be? Hmm...
This is suspicious... Maybe I should inspect it? Or not...
Sophie. There's something there... Do you want to check it?
What could this be... Sophie, what will you do?
Hm, this is... It may be worth investigating.
What item should I use?
I'll use this!
What item will you use?
Are you using that item?
I'll stop for now.
I have something else to do now...
We should stop this for now.
Don't you have something else to do?
No, it's not time to rest right now.
I have something to do before resting!
Sophie, don't you have something else to do now?
Perhaps you should rest another time?
Hm, hm, I see... So that's how it is...
Do this like this, and that like that... Yeah, I get it! ...I think.
Ask if there's something you don't understand. I'll teach you whatever I can.
Reading is important for alchemy training. Daily studies are the shortest path to mastery.
Gathering, gathering.
What will I find?
I'll gather carefully.
What can I gather here?
I'll take this.
Drawing water, drawing water.
How long should I rest?
Ah, I'm tired. I'll take a little break...
*Yawn*... Good night...
Okay, break's over! Time to do my best!
Ah, that was a good nap...
How long will you rest?
A short break? I understand.
Good night, Sophie. Have a nice rest.
Is your break over? Are you still tired?
Hehe, did you sleep well?
Hm, I think I'm getting kind of hungry...
Sophie, if you have time to space out, you should study... Sophie?
Hey, Sophie? What are you doing? You're wasting time.
Hm, hm, I see... Ah. Oh, hey. I was talking to a plant.
Hahaha, you sure are easygoing, Sophie. I don't dislike that.
*Yawn*... I'm kind of bored... And sleepy...
If we aren't doing anything, can I leave? I want to work on my guns.
Are you saying that you want to watch my puppet show? Oh, no...?
Hm, what should I make next... A blouse? Or maybe a one-piece dress?
Sophie? What it is? Did you fall asleep?
I don't mind, but... Are you not doing anything?
I'm bored! Bored bored bored! I'm not the type who can just stand around!
I'm home.
Whew, we're back.
Waah! Whew, that was close. I almost broke a plate.
Ahaha. Looking at the fountain makes me want to jump in.
Mm. These vegetables look good, no matter when I look at them...
Uu, this food looks so good... I'm starting to drool just looking at it.
This statue looks kind of like Pamela... Maybe it's just my imagination.
Wow, these books are thick... It would hurt to get hit by the corner...
Tick, tock, tick, tock... The sound of clocks is kind of calming.
It's hot! I-I need to be careful not to get burned!
This tree was here since the town was founded... It must be really old.
Grandma. I'm doing well...
Maybe I'll practice the piano.
Oh I know. I'll play the piano.
Hm, I still have a long way to go...
Ah, I'm no good...
Okay, I feel like I've gotten better!
Hehe, it's okay, I guess.
Ehehe, I've gotten pretty good!
Yeah, I played it well!
I have something else to do now...
I should do this after finding the kids.
I'll do this after helping the grocery store.
I have something else to do now...
I should relax a little longer...
It's not the time to go outside now. I need to use the "Compass of Hades" on Plachta...
I'm tired, so I shouldn't leave town now...
No, it's not the time to go outside now... I need to look for grandma's book.
I shouldn't go outside right now.
Starting Synthesis. First, select the item you'd like to make.
Next, select the required materials. Choose a card on screen, then select a material from the ones you possess.
Now you will actually add the materials you chose.
Actions during Synthesis will consume points (CP). If you don't have enough CP, your actions will not do anything.
Next, the attribute value of the material is added. The material's attribute affects what value it contributes to.
Next, the effect power of the material is added. Effect power of materials is averaged together.
Depending on the traits on the material, it can add more attribute value to the item being created.
Attribute value will be added according to the number of attribute spaces. If the attribute of the item matches, move value is added.
Items have their own hidden properties. The total attribute value of added materials can draw out these properties.
The container is full. Select items to discard (discarded items will be converted to money).
You do not have the necessary DLC installed for the loaded save data. Load has been canceled.
The loaded save data has been modified. Load cancelled.
The corresponding exploration equipment is not equipped.
Data download is not complete. Load cancelled.
Starting network save. Is this okay?
Starting network load. Is this okay?
You don't possess an item to give.
Is this for me...? Thank you very much, Sophie. I'm very happy.
Is it really okay to have this...? Thank you! I'm happy!
Whoa! Is it really okay to take this!? I'm really happy about this!
Is it... Really okay to have this? I see... I'm very happy, thank you!
This is! I-is it really okay!? ...I'm very fond of things like this. I owe you one.
Are you... Giving this to me? Ehehe... I'm very happy.
Is this for me...? I see. I'll accept it gratefully.
This is wonderful. You seem to know exactly what I like.
Is it really okay to have this? Thank you.
I'm very happy. You're such a good girl, Sophie, giving me such a wonderful gift.
Wow! You're giving this to me!? You really know how to win a girl's heart!
Oh my... Hehe, I'm happy. Thank you, Sophie.
Are you giving this to me? I'm happy. I'll give you some vegetables sometime!
Wow! I'm really happy about this. Thank you very much, Sophie.
I can have this? ...Hehe, I'll take it gratefully.
Wow... Thank you for such a wonderful gift.
Ah, this is good. Thank you, Sophie.
Huh, this is really good. Can I really have it? Thank you!
This looks like a good item. I can tell at a glance. Thank you.
I can have this...? I'm happy. Thank you very much.
Hm... Not bad. I like it.
Ah, this gift makes me happy. Thank you, I'll take it.
Huh, this is great. Thank you, I'll take it.
Oh my, this is good. I can really have it? Thank you.
Wow, I can have this? Yeah, I think it's great.
Hehe, what a wonderful gift. Thank you.
I can really have this? I'll have to repay you sometime.
This is great. I'm really happy, Sophie.
Thank you very much, Sophie. I'll accept it.
Wow, this makes me happy. I'll accept it.
Whoa, thanks! I'll take it!
This is good. Thank you.
I see, you're giving this to me. Thank you.
Thank you very much. I'll take it.
...I'll take it.
Not bad at all. I don't dislike it.
Thank you, I'm happy.
I'm happy. Thank you.
Ah. Thank you, Sophie. I'll accept it.
I'll take it gratefully.
This is good. I'll take it gratefully.
Huh... This is good. Thank you very much.
...Well, I'll accept it.
Oh, uh, yeah... I'll take it...
Oh, this... I'll take it, but...
A-ahaha... Yeah, I'm happy... Thanks...
Wait, this is... I'm thankful for it, but, uh...
Thank you...
This is... Well, I guess I'll take it...
Huh? T-this is for me? I-I see. I'll take it...
This is... Well, I'm happy... I guess, haha...
Hm? This is for me? This is a little troubling. What should I do...
A-ahaha, this, huh... Y-yes... T-thank you...
Wait, this!? Um... Uh... I-I guess I'll take it...
Oh, this is... Uh, yeah, I'll take it...
This is... Hmm... I-I'll accept it gratefully...
Uu, this is! Uh, no... I'll still take it...
Uh, um... This is hard to say, but... Oh, no, I'll accept it...
...Hey, Sophie. You know I like plants, right? Did you forget?
Uu!? Sophie, this is actually kind of... No.. Uh... I'm happy, haha...
Wha!? U-uh... I-I suppose I'll accept it...
I'll... Accept it...
This isn't... A prank, right? Well, whatever. I'll take it.
Uh, this is, um... I'm thankful for the thought, but... Uh...
Oh, yes... I'll take it, thank you...
You need to consider what people like and dislike when you give them gifts, you know?
Wait, this is your gift!? Uh, no, never mind. I'm happy... I mean it, okay?
Umm... Ahaha, I'm happy, thank you... What should I do with this...
...You chose this for me? I'll take it. Thank you.
Wait, this couldn't be... Uu... T-thank you very much...
A gift... For me? What did I do to deserve this...
Huh, a gift for me...? Hehe, now what's this all about?
Oh, you're giving something to me? Thanks, Sophie.
A gift for me? Haha, I'm happy.
Hm, a gift? What are you giving me? This is exciting, no matter how old I get.
You're... Giving something to me? I look forward to it.
A gift...? You're giving something to me...?
Oh dear, a gift for me? Hehe, what could it be?
Hm, a gift for me, huh? What could it be?
Oh my, you're giving me a gift? I'm excited to see what it is.
A gift for me? Hmm, now what exactly is it?
Ah, Sophie. You're giving something to me?
A gift for me? I'm happy, what are you giving me?
A gift for me? This should be fun.
Sophie. You've given a lot to me, so I've prepared a thank you gift.
Sophie, here. I've brought you a present, as thanks for always.
Hey, Sophie. Thanks as always. I've got something for you.
Sophie. I've brought you a gift. Would you accept it?
Sophie. Will you accept this? It's my way of thanking you.
Sophie, this is from me... As thanks for always...
Sophie. Just be quiet and take this. It's a thank you gift, nothing special.
Sophie. I've brought you something nice today. You should be happy!
Sophie, this is a thank you for always. Will you accept it?
Hehe, Sophie. I've brought you a little present today.
Sophie! This is a present from me to you! Here you go!
Sophie. Here you go. It's a gift from me.
Sophie, you're always giving me things. I've brought something in return.
Sophie. I'm always receiving things from you, so I brought you something today.
I'd be happy if you liked it. I'll be going now.
Thanks as always. I'll see you later.
Use it with care. See you!
I just hope you like it. I'll be taking my leave now.
Use it however you see fit. I'll see you again.
Please use it however you like... I'll be going home now.
...I'm done here. See you.
So? It's great, isn't it? I'll be leaving now.
I can't just keep taking things, after all. I'll be going now.
Hehe, do you like it? I'll see you again.
I hope you like it. I'll see you at the café!
I'm really thankful for always. See you again.
Hehe, do you like it? I'll be going now. See you.
I'm always grateful for your help. I'll go now...
Sophie. I'm grateful, but I can't accept any more.
I'd feel bad taking any more. Maybe another time.
No, I don't want more. I feel bad taking so much.
No, no. I can't accept that much.
You're always giving me things. I'll just accept your thoughts right now.
You always give me things... I don't need anything right now.
It'll trouble me if you give me so much. I'm sorry, not right now.
Oh... You're always giving me things. I'm sorry, I can't take it now.
No, I can't accept so much. I'll pass for now.
You always give me so much, Sophie... I'm sorry, I can't accept it.
What? I feel bad taking so much from you. I'm sorry.
I'm sorry. I've already accepted so much... I have to refuse for now.
You're always giving me so much, Sophie. I can't accept anything now.
I feel bad taking so much from you. I'll have to refuse for now.
What to do...
I feel weak...
What should I do...
What can I do...
Now then...
What should I do...
This is troubling...
What to do...
Very troubling...
Oh my.
"%S" completed.
"%S" can be reported.
"%S" has ended.
"%S" deadline is near.
That fruit looks good... Wait, it's a hunter's trap!
A sudden squall! I'm totally soaked.
Found some good fruit. It's fresh and delicious!
Discovered spring water! Good water quenches my thirst.
Chased by a pack of wild dogs. I'm not hurt, but I'm tired from running...
The ground suddenly shakes. I tripped and fell!
Ate some delicious fruit. The sweet and sour taste fills my mouth.
Found an unusual butterfly. Something good should happen today.
Found a shining pebble.
Found a silver shining pebble.
Found a golden shining pebble.
Found a rainbow shining pebble.
Returning to title. Is this okay?
Hm, hm. This goes like this, and that like that. Okay, I got it!
Hm, hm, hmm. Okay, I learned it!
Here I go!
I wonder if there's anything good?
I'll gather a lot.
I'll draw some water.
Now then. What should I make next?
Found a resting cabin for travelers. Took a nice break inside.
Found a forest full of stumps. Sat down and had a fun chat.
Found a tree that reaches the heavens. Cooled off in the shade with the sound of rustling leaves.
Found a spring of clean water. The cool water quenches our thirst.
Found a nice rock to sit down on. Took a little rest with everyone.
Found small ruins to shelter from the elements. Took a nice rest.
Met some adventurers on a journey. They gave us a charm for good luck.
Found a meadow with lots of flowers. Had fun making garlands.
Found a lush forest of fresh leaves. Breathing the scent of greenery is refreshing.
Found a faintly glowing spring. Drinking the water gives us strength.
Amazing scenery spreads below as we walk a mountain path. The beautiful scenery is exciting.
Found an altar with a large rock in some ruins. Touching the rock fills the body with warmth.
Met a traveling merchant. Received some delicious snacks.
Found lots of ripe fruit on the trees. Everyone enjoyed eating it.
Found some suspicious mushrooms growing. Eating them fills the body with energy.
Found a spring of clear water. Had fun playing in the water.
Found something shiny in the ground. After digging it up, it turned out to be money.
Found a wagon stuck in the mud. We were given a little something for helping them out.
Picked up a strange glowing rock. A merchant who passed by insisted on buying it.
Found an old jar by the roadside. After opening it, we found that it was full of money.
Heard some rustling in the bushes. Monsters suddenly came leaping out!
I thought I tripped on something, and it turned out to be monsters in the ground!
The air in front of us seemed distorted. Monsters suddenly appeared!
While gazing out at the water, monsters suddenly came jumping out!
Monsters suddenly came leaping out from between the rocks!
A pack of monsters came out of the bushes, and we were surrounded before we knew it!
Monsters came jumping out from up in the trees!
We heard a splashing sound behind us, and we turned around to see a pack of glaring monsters!
Ending game. Are you sure?
Save the data ?
Load the data ?
There is no save data
